motds.body: Make your choice and settle the score… do you side with The Foundation or The Ice King? Choose your Team, win Rivalries, and climb the Leaderboard to unlock new loot!
motds.title: The Showdown Begins Now!

motds.body: There’s never been a better time to jump back in to Save the World! The April 16 free-to-play update brings many improvements, including the ability to turn found weapons into Schematics, streamlined upgrades and XP, and much more. See the full list of changes by checking out fn.gg/STW-EP
motds.title: Game Changing Updates Are Coming

motds.body: Log in to the Fortnite Showdown Global Leaderboards to get the “Original Rivalry” Spray. Beat Rivals and climb the ranks for a chance at IRL rewards like GPUs, consoles, and more!
motds.title: See How You Stack Up!

motds.body: Fight for The Foundation or The Ice King and best your Rivals to unlock powerful gameplay loot and cosmetic rewards for all!
motds.title: The Showdown

motds.body: Before the Bus, there was the Storm. On April 16, Save the World is going free-to-play! Current Save the World owners will earn in-game rewards and all players can pre-register to earn in-game cosmetics plus a Hero. Get details at fn.gg/stw-f2p
motds.tabTitle: Play Save the World for Free - April 16
motds.title: Play Save the World for Free - April 16

messages.body: Commanders, we've moved the Save the World message of the day to appear when you first log into Fortnite!
messages.title: Message of the day update
